top_fragments.summary: For non-trivial Phytoritas work, bind gh auth, issue, and issue-based branch before further writes.
Avoid PowerShell text-cmdlet file mutation for UTF-8, BOM, or Korean-sensitive files; prefer apply_patch or explicit encodings.
Prefer parism for read-only structured exploration when it fits.
When long pytest runs appear stalled on Windows, use bounded background execution and inspect redirected logs.

quality_notes: Global workflow and Windows-safety fragments were rehydrated again before the assistant-alias validation pass, but repo-specific issue61 truth still had to come from fresh file reads plus the current .rah packet.
